title: Harden shell_exec approval gate: allowlist validation, destructive classifier, self-grant prevention

AC1.note: src/lib/shell-permissions-hardening.test.ts: B1 save/match tests; quoted metacharacter case explicitly asserted

AC2.note: B2 tests: isShellCommandAllowed('rm -rf /', ['rm -rf /']) === false; suggestShellPatterns('rm -rf /') offers neither grant; stress P2b PASS

AC3.note: B3 tests over 15 interpreter/wrapper commands; 'bun test*' still valid (existing round-trip test unchanged)

AC4.note: migration test asserts kept/rejected partition and non-destructive load; TUI prints the audit once per session (tui-shell.ts)

AC5.note: src/lib/self-grant.test.ts: touchesAgentCredentials tables, gate + pattern refusal, fingerprint change detection; stress P6 PASS

AC6.note: src/commands/agent-destructive-gate.test.ts: 5 tests, incl. default-deny preserved for a destructive tool

AC7.note: src/harness/tool/builtin/spawn-subagent-isolation.test.ts: 7 tests; isolation passed pre-existing code (recorded, no change), summary cap added; stress M3 RISK->PASS

AC8.note: src/commands/agent-approval-binding.test.ts: fingerprint delivered, mismatched answer denies, bare boolean still works

AC9.note: bun test 2125 pass/0 fail; tsc clean; keryx health run PASS score 93 after each of the 6 commits

AC10.note: harness updated: P2b now asserts the gate not the raw glob, M3 asserts the cap, new P5/P6; re-run shows 9 PASS / 1 RISK (P1, out of scope)

tasks.title: Add/adjust tests and make them pass
